title: A Country Gentleman and His Family
author: Margaret Oliphant
description:
Theodore Warrender was still at Oxford when his father
died. He was a youth who had come up from his school
with the highest hopes of what he was to do at the university.
It had indeed been laid out for him by an admiring
tutor with anticipations which were almost certainties: "If
you will only work as well as you have done these last
two years!" These years had been spent in the dignified
ranks of Sixth Form, where he had done almost everything
that boy can do.
